title: blechnum lenormandii
intro: Blechnum lenormandii, also known as the rock fern or New Zealand fan fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Blechnum lenormandii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs and colds, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Blechnum lenormandii are typically made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
